title: Mobile Health Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Mobile Health Care 28 Matching Service Providers ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ROSEBURG MOBILE MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mobile health van with services such as: -Treatment for acute conditions (e.g., minor infections, injuries, respiratory illnesses) -Testing for urinary infections, strep throat, flu, and COVID-19 -Basic wound care, including debridement, incision, and drainage procedures -Chronic Condition Management -Support for diabetes, high blood pressure, and other long-term health concerns -Medication management and lab test orders -Pelvic exams, Pap smears, and skin biopsies -Toenail procedures and cerumen (earwax) removal 621 W Madrone Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 10am-2pm: Roseburg Dream Center 2555 NE Diamond Lake Boulvard, Roseburg, OR 97470 1st Thursday of the month 10am-2pm: Roseburg Department of Human Services 738 West Harvard Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 2nd, 3rd, and 4th Thursday of the month noon-3pm: Adapt Opioid Treatment Program 406 NE Winchester Street Roseburg, OR 97470 (541) 440-3500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with blood pressure tests, dental, vision, general wellness, and mammogram appointments. Provides limited basic personal care items such as soap, shampoo, and toothpaste 13565 SW Walker Road Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Call Center Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm Walk in hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-1pm, Monday/Thursday by appointment only Email (503) 591-9025 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BLACK THISTLE STREET AID MONTHLY POP-UP MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a pop-up medical clinic in a public park once per month and mobile medical care for individuals experiencing homelessness. Services include wound care, herbal and medical provider consultations, reproductive health information, first aid, harm reduction and hygiene supplies. Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: 2nd Wednesday of the month 11am-2pm Email (541) 232-8546 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER MEDICAL SERVICES AND NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mobile medical care and needle exchange by hosting Central City Concern's and Outside In's medical vans and syringe exchange program. Includes a full range of health services such as disease management, routine primary care, HIV/STI testing, women's health care, mental health, and transgender care. Also provides assistance with enrollment in Oregon Health Plan (OHP) or other health insurance plans. For the syringe exchange, users get an even exchange for however many syringes they bring in, though no one will be turned away for not having returns. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: -Medical van: Age 13 and older. Low-income individuals and households. Must not be receiving primary care from another provider. -Needle exchange: Ages 18 and older Hours: Medical van: Tuesday 9am-3pm Needle exchange: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY OUTREACH THROUGH RADICAL EMPOWERMENT STREET OUTREACH ALLIANCE PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management/coordinated care, community trainings/education, Naloxone distribution/overdose education, safe sex items, syringe services, and harm reduction supplies. Eligibility: Ages 16-29 experiencing homelessness or housing instability Hours: Requests for supplies: Tuesday 10am-2pm Supply drops occur on Tuesday 4pm-7pm Email (541) 870-0036 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CULTIVATE INITIATIVES CULTIVATE INIATIVES AT MIDLAND LIBRARY MOBILE SHOWERS AND HYGIENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mobile van for showers, clothing, haircuts, hygiene products, health education, and provider referrals. Some services are conducted by nursing students and depend on volunteers. 12505 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site Email (503) 477-9742 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LA CLINICA HEALTH LA CLINICA MOBILE HEALTH SERVICES MOBILE HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Mobile Health Center is a 38-foot clinic on wheels that provides basic medical, emergency dental, and behavioral health care. Nurse practitioners, medical assistants, and dental staff work on the vehicle, which includes medical exam areas, a full dental suite, an office area, a lab, and a restroom. The medical and dental exam areas can be enclosed to provide privacy for patients. Some vaccinations including flu vaccine, is available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Email (541) 512-3922 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOSAIC COMMUNITY HEALTH MOBILE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mobile health care
